summary: Blog post on barefoot 'gravel cruncher' horses competing booted across disciplines like endurance and trail riding, citing examples and associations that endorse Cavallo hoof boots.
Blog post promoting Cavallo's support of the ACTHA competitive trail horse program and a $5000 bonus offer for competitors riding in Cavallo Hoof Boots.
Lifestyle blog post by Carole Herder encouraging horse owners to slow down, spend quality time grooming and pleasure riding their horses.
Long-form essay by Joe Camp questioning routine chemical horse de-worming and advocating fecal egg count testing as a natural alternative.
Blog post sharing Monty Roberts' natural-horsemanship tips for preparing a young horse to stand calmly for the farrier or trimmer, including using an artificial arm.
Lifestyle blog post by Carole Herder urging horse owners to make daily pleasure riding a routine priority and prepare tack the night before.
Blog post by Carole Herder on equine dentistry, questioning conventional power-tool tooth floating and exploring a gentler, more natural approach.
Blog post by Carole Herder on natural horse health care, recommending massage and complementary therapies like the Masterson Method over synthetic drugs.
Short testimonial from Australian barefoot trimmer Sarah Kuyken praising Cavallo hoof boots for fit, durability and affordability.
Educational blog post by Carole Herder explaining hoof function, blood circulation and shock absorption, and how metal shoes impede them versus going barefoot.
Short customer testimonial from Marnie (Idaho) about switching her horse Bunny from metal shoes to Cavallo hoof boots for trail riding and arena work.
Blog post highlighting barefoot horse resources, noting Liberated Horsemanship's endorsement of Cavallo boots, its trimming courses, and the International Bare Hoof Association.
